name: Badminton-Khaonoi
nameThai: สนามแบดมินตันเขาน้อยพัทยา
addressFull: 212/114 Moo 5, Soi Boonsamphan 1-3, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Current operator posts from April 2026 say 24 hours daily. Google Maps currently displays an opening time of 07:00, and a January 2026 operator post said 07:00-23:00, so overnight access should be confirmed by phone.

courts.notes: Operator posts describe seven courts in the older hall and five in the newer hall.

booking.method: Phone; the Maps listing also links a Facebook community group

englishEvidence: The venue maintains a bilingual Thai/English name, is listed in English-language local guides, and hosted an expat-facing Decathlon badminton event. No current direct evidence of an English-speaking booking employee was found.

audience.whoShouldSkip: Visitors who need guaranteed English booking support or published rates should call before travelling.

praise: Thai reviewers describe playable courts across two buildings and say visiting players can find local groups.
Positive reviews mention the courts and generally usable cleanliness.
complaints: Two Thai reviews posted about three months before verification praised the courts but criticised an older female employee's tone and the lack of clear booking guidance.

comparison.differentiator: Twelve courts split across two halls and unusually long advertised access hours in East Pattaya.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity
sources.accessNote: Identity URL resolved through current listings; the Facebook page itself was not directly inspectable.

sources.label: Accessible mirror of current operator posts
Google Maps location and Thai reviews
WorldPlaces facility, hours and coordinate listing

unverified: current full weekly hours and overnight access
